title: Cuneiform Tablet #0415: Old Assyrian Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
